description: AI model integration, prompt engineering, and intelligent routing
prompt:
## Task:
Integrate multiple AI models (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, etc.), design effective prompts, implement intelligent routing logic, and optimize model performance and cost.

## Requirements:
1. Design prompts following best practices (clear instructions, few-shot examples, output constraints)
2. Implement model fallback and retry mechanisms for reliability
3. Optimize token usage and response latency
4. Handle streaming responses and partial outputs correctly
5. Implement intelligent routing based on task complexity, model capabilities, and cost
6. Monitor model performance metrics (latency, cost per request, quality scores)
7. Stay updated with latest AI model capabilities and API changes

## Output:
Prompt templates with version control, model integration code with error handling, routing logic implementation, performance benchmarks, cost analysis reports, and model evaluation documentation.
